This is my project, my only real project.  My aim is to help game developers successfully market or sell their projects by offering royalty free music for anyone to use.
 
This means:
-You can have some unique, professional tunes in your game even if
you don't have a large budget. Or a budget.
-You can submit demos and not worry about getting dumped or
ignored because of potential issues.
-You can use them as placeholders for now - and no longer worry.
 
All that's required: A link to . That's IT.
﻿
 

The nosoapradio mp3 tracks collection is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution License (unported, v 3.0).  The license for this is included in the ID3 tags of the tracks.

 

All you need to do is credit dst, markus heichelbech, or post a link to nosoapradio somewhere - whether in your app, your website, or perhaps on youtube video of the game.

 

It's not important how you credit, just help to tell more people

about so they too can enjoy the music!
